description: The marketing team needs to classify hotels into 'International' or 'Domestic' markets based on their visitor history in the 'demodb' database (user: root, pass: GymAnything123!). Update the 'Hotels' class to include a String property named 'Market' and populate it for every hotel that has had visitors. Classify a hotel as 'International' if 50% or more of the visits (incoming 'HasStayed' edges) are from Profiles with a Nationality different from the Hotel's Country, and 'Domestic' if more than 50% of the visits are from Profiles with a Nationality the same as the Hotel's Country.
